findings.title: Local Claude settings file exists in workspace
findings.evidence: Local agent settings can contain URLs, tokens, or copied command history.
findings.remediation: Keep this file ignored and do not commit it.

findings.title: Local Claude settings contain signed AWS URLs
findings.evidence: Signed AWS URL markers were detected.
findings.remediation: Remove transient URLs from local agent state and avoid copying them into tracked files.

findings.title: Vercel configuration references raw AWS credential variables
findings.evidence: AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID / AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY env mappings are present.
findings.remediation: Prefer short-lived credentials or platform-native secret references where possible.

findings.title: Deploy workflow propagates raw AWS app credentials
findings.evidence: APP_AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID / APP_AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY are synced into Amplify.
findings.remediation: Prefer OIDC or narrower-scoped managed credentials over long-lived keys.

findings.title: Workflow appears to print or echo secrets-adjacent content
findings.evidence: A broad check found both secrets references and print-like statements.
findings.remediation: Review workflow logging to ensure secrets never reach logs.
